error_signature: 42883 operator does not exist: extensions.vector <=> extensions.vector null
title: Supabase vector operator does not exist error
symptom: When attempting to search for documents in Supabase, the error '42883 operator does not exist: extensions.vector <=> extensions.vector null' is returned.
applies_when: Attempting to search for documents using vector operations
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different database setup
No vector operations are being used
root_cause: This error occurs because the necessary vector extension is not available in the Supabase database schema. Without this extension, the database cannot perform vector operations, leading to the error when trying to execute queries that rely on it.
fix_steps: Add the line 'CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;' to your database setup script.
Set the search path to include the extensions by executing 'SET search_path = public, extensions;'
agent_instruction: Ensure the vector extension is created and the search path is set correctly in your Supabase database.
